title: TestLoginTokenRequest
description: Admin-only request to validate a browser-obtained OIDC id_token against a candidate (unsaved) security configuration. Used to confirm a real login would resolve the expected identity before saving the configuration.

securityConfiguration.description: Candidate (unsaved) security configuration to test against.

idToken.description: OIDC id_token obtained by the admin's browser from the identity provider during the test login.
